# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

interface StreamRequestBody {
  content: string | string[];
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  chunkSize?: number;
  delayMs?: number;
}

const MAX_CONTENT_SIZE = 10 * 1024 * 1024; // 10MB
const MAX_CHUNK_SIZE = 64 * 1024; // 64KB
const MAX_DELAY_MS = 5000; // 5 seconds
const DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE = 1024;
const DEFAULT_DELAY_MS = 100;

const ALLOWED_HEADERS = new Set([
  'content-type',
  'cache-control',
  'x-custom-header',
  'x-stream-id',
  'x-correlation-id',
]);

function sanitizeHeaders(headers?: Record<string, string>): Record<string, string> {
  if (!headers || typeof headers !== 'object') {
    return {};
  }

  const sanitized: Record<string, string> = {};
  
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(headers)) {
    const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase().trim();
    
    if (!ALLOWED_HEADERS.has(normalizedKey)) {
      continue;
    }

    if (typeof value !== 'string') {
      continue;
    }

    const sanitizedValue = value.replace(/[\r\n]/g, '').substring(0, 1024);
    sanitized[normalizedKey] = sanitizedValue;
  }

  return sanitized;
}

function validateAndSanitizeBody(body: unknown): StreamRequestBody {
  if (!body || typeof body !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('Invalid request body');
  }

  const { content, headers, chunkSize, delayMs } = body as Partial<StreamRequestBody>;

  if (!content) {
    throw new Error('Content is required');
  }

  let sanitizedContent: string[];
  
  if (typeof content === 'string') {
    sanitizedContent = [content];
  } else if (Array.isArray(content)) {
    if (content.length === 0) {
      throw new Error('Content array cannot be empty');
    }
    if (content.length > 10000) {
      throw new Error('Content array too large');
    }
    sanitizedContent = content.filter(item => typeof item === 'string');
    if (sanitizedContent.length === 0) {
      throw new Error('Content array must contain strings');
    }
  } else {
    throw new Error('Content must be a string or array of strings');
  }

  const totalSize = sanitizedContent.reduce((sum, str) => sum + str.length, 0);
  if (totalSize > MAX_CONTENT_SIZE) {
    throw new Error(`Content size exceeds maximum of ${MAX_CONTENT_SIZE} bytes`);
  }

  const validatedChunkSize = typeof chunkSize === 'number' && chunkSize > 0 && chunkSize <= MAX_CHUNK_SIZE
    ? Math.floor(chunkSize)
    : DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE;

  const validatedDelayMs = typeof delayMs === 'number' && delayMs >= 0 && delayMs <= MAX_DELAY_MS
    ? Math.floor(delayMs)
    : DEFAULT_DELAY_MS;

  return {
    content: sanitizedContent,
    headers: sanitizeHeaders(headers),
    chunkSize: validatedChunkSize,
    delayMs: validatedDelayMs,
  };
}

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
}

async function* generateChunks(
  content: string[],
  chunkSize: number,
  delayMs: number
): AsyncGenerator<Uint8Array> {
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();

  for (const item of content) {
    let offset = 0;
    while (offset < item.length) {
      const chunk = item.substring(offset, offset + chunkSize);
      yield encoder.encode(chunk);
      offset += chunkSize;

      if (offset < item.length && delayMs > 0) {
        await sleep(delayMs);
      }
    }

    if (delayMs > 0) {
      await sleep(delayMs);
    }
  }
}

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }), {
      status: 405,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  try {
    const contentType = req.headers.get('content-type') || '';
    if (!contentType.includes('application/json')) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content-Type must be application/json' }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      });
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const validatedBody = validateAndSanitizeBody(body);

    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        try {
          const chunks = generateChunks(
            validatedBody.content as string[],
            validatedBody.chunkSize!,
            validatedBody.delayMs!
          );

          for await (const chunk of chunks) {
            controller.enqueue(chunk);
          }

          controller.close();
        } catch (error) {
          controller.error(error);
        }
      },
      cancel() {
        // Cleanup if client disconnects
      },
    });

    const responseHeaders = new Headers({
      'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
      'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-transform',
      'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
      'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
      'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
    });

    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(validatedBody.headers || {})) {
      responseHeaders.set(key, value);
    }

    return new Response(stream, {
      status: 200,
      headers: responseHeaders,
    });

  } catch (error) {
    const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Internal server error';
    const statusCode = errorMessage.includes('required') || 
                       errorMessage.includes('must be') || 
                       errorMessage.includes('Invalid') ||
                       errorMessage.includes('exceeds') ||
                       errorMessage.includes('too large')
      ? 400
      : 500;

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: errorMessage }), {
      status: statusCode,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }
}
